description: Detects fwrite/fread/write/send with sizeof(struct) which is non-portable due to padding. Simplified from Rust: flags all call_expression nodes without filtering by function name or verifying sizeof argument contains a struct type. Does not check for __attribute__((packed)) or #pragma pack. Languages scoped to c only.

flag.message: Function call with sizeof argument detected -- verify fwrite(), fread(), write(), send() calls with sizeof(struct) are not used for serialization. Struct padding makes raw struct I/O non-portable across compilers and architectures. Use explicit serialization with __attribute__((packed)) or serialize field-by-field.
